title: The Art of Layering: A Guide to Curating Your Necklace Stack
content:
Layering necklaces is an art form that allows you to express your personal style. A well-curated necklace stack can elevate any outfit, from a simple t-shirt to an elegant evening dress. The key is to mix different lengths, textures, and styles to create a look that is uniquely yours.

Start with a delicate choker as your base, add a pendant necklace, and finish with a longer chain. Don't be afraid to mix metals or add a pop of color with gemstones. The possibilities are endless!
author: Aparra Team
